dismissalText.commentary: Venkatesh Iyer c Shubman Gill b Rabada 19 (7b 3x4 1x6 9m) SR: 271.42

dismissalComment.html: that is a superb catch from Shubman Gill running back from mid off! Venky backs away towards the leg side and slogs at a short of a length ball that seams away from him from over the wicket, the bat turns in his hand as Rabada hits it hard and the ball lobs over the in-field at mid-off, Gill covers good ground running back and judges it well

dismissalText.commentary: Virat Kohli b Holder 43 (25b 5x4 1x6 40m) SR: 172

dismissalComment.html: he's dragged it on to his stumps and look at Holder celebrate, he is pumped! Short of a length ball wide outside off, Kohli tried to drag it through the leg side with the pull shot and got a bottom edge back on to his stumps. Holder bowled a wobble seam delivery

dismissalText.commentary: Devdutt Padikkal c †Buttler b Holder 30 (19b 5x4 0x6 33m) SR: 157.89

dismissalComment.html: two in three balls for Holder! Caught behind but Padikkal reviews. He should have been forward to that fuller length from Holder but ended up prodding from inside his crease as it zipped across him from over the wicket, clear spike on ultra edge and GT are fighting back

dismissalText.commentary: Venkatesh Iyer c Shubman Gill b Rabada 19 (7b 3x4 1x6 9m) SR: 271.42

dismissalComment.html: that is a superb catch from Shubman Gill running back from mid off! Venky backs away towards the leg side and slogs at a short of a length ball that seams away from him from over the wicket, the bat turns in his hand as Rabada hits it hard and the ball lobs over the in-field at mid-off, Gill covers good ground running back and judges it well
